allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5297/api/dashboard/stats' -Headers @{'X-API-KEY'='rankD'} -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("OK: {0}, bytes: {1}" -f $r.StatusCode, $r.RawContentLength\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR: {0}" -f $_.Exception.Message\) })
